2302230.name: Within Time
2302230.description:
THE SUMMARY

6 Months remain before the fate of the world is sealed and humanity as it's known ceases to exist.

Yunis Caelum leads the charge to save humanity followed closely by his ensemble of childhood friends, Estella Kisiel, Angie Alfaro and Rictor Fitzsimmons as they venture into Iolade, a world connected loosely to their own through a force unbeknownst to them. Follow this group of unlikely saviours as they traverse the many regions of this unfamiliar land, taking down each Antiborne that stands in their way to salvation. 

With hopes of gaining answers to June's unprecedented disappearance just a year prior, the unlikely group of Heroes make their way through Iolade, piecing together their larger roles in this prophecy as they aim to put an end to the Scion of Time's terror and allow both Iolade and Terrus to live in peace.

FATE CHANGES FOR NO ONE.

GAMEPLAY & CONTENT:

  • 13 Unique Playable Characters

  • 3 Main Endings

  • 6 Acts of gameplay, each spanning roughly 4 or so hours

  • Full voice acting for story cutscenes and battle encounters

  • 9 unique regions of land to explore as you journey throughout the two worlds of Within Time

  • Unique Turn-based combat making use of the STANCE system, exclusive to Within Time

  • Over 100 achievements to obtain in your journey across Iolade and Terrus

  • Over 200 tracks composed by Oxiqa

THE TEAM

TEAM INNERMINDS is a small indie studio responsible for the development of WITHIN TIME, lead by developer LUNAVIA.

With a project overseen by programmer, pixel artist and lead writer Lunavia, Within Time features extensive combat mechanics, unique gameplay aspects across the board and various styles of gameplay for players to enjoy throughout the game's 50 hour runtime.

With all music lead, composed and recorded by talented musician Oxiqa the game features a lengthy OST that's certain resonate with players and fans alike! Using his experience on smaller projects in his past, Oxiqa brings an unheard talent to the table.

Featuring character art and designs from the very talented Yotsori, Lunavia's many character concepts are brought to life by the stellar character artist of TEAM INNERMINDS. Having experience working on various other game projects and creating character designs for just short of half a decade, Yotsori's talents shine through when visualising the characters of Within Time.

Illustrations and additional media designed by the incredibly talented Fluffmilk, a developer in her own regards, lends her years of artistic experience to create unforgettable art for the promotion and distribution of Within Time media.

Featuring Bakker as an additional Pixel Artist alongside Lunavia, his almost eight years in the field lend well to the project of Within Time as he creates unforgettable art, designs and set pieces that are sure to stick with the players.

Additional writing and combat design also provided by Luke and Mango as they both lend their extensive knowledge of JRPGs and TBRPGs to the Within Time team to create an unforgettable combat experience that'll keep players hooked for hundreds of hours!
